title: A Causal Method for Treatment-Effect Estimation
abstract: We propose a causal method for estimating treatment effects under confounding.

title: A Causal Method for Treatment-Effect Estimation
abstract: We propose a causal method for estimating treatment effects under confounding (revised).

title: Causal Discovery via Score-Based Structure Learning
abstract: We present a score-based algorithm for causal discovery from observational data.

title: Representation Learning for Causal Inference in LLM Agents
abstract: We study causal representation learning applied to LLM-based agent setups.
